title: Waystones pets addon
description: Adds the ability to automatically teleport your tamed pets with you when using Waystones no leads required
body:
# 🐾 Waystones Pets Addon

This addon makes your tamed pets automatically teleport with you when using Waystones—no leads, no hassle. It’s a simple, seamless way to keep your companions with you as you explore the world.

## 💡 Why I Made This

Existing pet teleport mods often felt unreliable or outdated. After struggling with bugs and inconsistent behavior, I reached out to one of the original authors—who kindly explained they no longer had access to the source code and might try to recover it. With no updates since, I decided to build a clean, lightweight alternative from scratch that _just works_.

## 🛠️ Contributing

Found a bug or want to suggest a feature? Open an issue or submit a pull request—contributions are always welcome!

## 💬 Join the Community

Hop into the Discord to chat, share feedback, or stay updated on new features: 👉 [https://discord.gg/QAWEbFb9eF](https://discord.gg/QAWEbFb9eF)

## ☕ Support Me on Ko-fi

If you like this mod and want to support future development (or just say thanks!), you can buy me a coffee on Ko-fi: 👉 [https://ko-fi.com/imagineforgee](https://ko-fi.com/imagineforgee)

Your support helps me keep projects like this alive and maintained. Thank you!
